checks.name: XML Structure Validity
checks.description: Checks if the file is valid, well-formed XML

checks.name: GUID Format Validation
checks.description: Validates GUID format: {xxxxxxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx} (lowercase hex only)

checks.name: GUID Uniqueness Check
checks.description: Ensures all GUIDs are unique within the file

checks.name: 2-Space Indentation
checks.description: Checks for consistent 2-space indentation

checks.name: Tab Detection
checks.description: Detects tab characters (should use spaces)

checks.name: File Ending Format
checks.description: Ensures file ends with </TcPlcObject> only

checks.name: Property VAR Blocks
checks.description: Ensures all property getters have VAR blocks

checks.name: LineIds Count
checks.description: Validates LineIds count matches methods/properties

checks.name: Element Ordering
checks.description: Checks if elements are in correct order

checks.name: Naming Conventions
checks.description: Validates TwinCAT naming conventions (FB_, I_, ST_, etc.)

checks.name: CDATA Formatting
checks.description: Checks CDATA section formatting

checks.name: Excessive Blank Lines
checks.description: Detects excessive consecutive blank lines (>3 in a row)

checks.name: POU Structure Validation
checks.description: Validates POU subtype-specific structure (FUNCTION cannot have Methods/Properties/Actions, FUNCTION must have return type)

checks.name: POU Header Structure
checks.description: Checks POU header-level integrity: misfiled INTERFACE in .TcPOU, inline STRUCT in variable section, invalid EXTENDS usage

checks.name: VAR PROTECTED / VAR_PROTECTED Block Prohibition
checks.description: SERVER POLICY: 'VAR PROTECTED' and 'VAR_PROTECTED' are forbidden variable block keywords. Use VAR...END_VAR and expose members via METHOD/PROPERTY with PROTECTED access specifier.

checks.name: POU Method Structure
checks.description: Checks method-level structural integrity: METHOD in main ST, VAR in method impl, invalid RETURN, VAR_INPUT mutations, undeclared assignments

checks.name: Main ST VAR_INPUT Mutation
checks.description: Detects assignments to POU VAR_INPUT symbols in main <Implementation><ST> block

checks.name: POU Interface Contract
checks.description: Checks IMPLEMENTS clause: interface file existence, method signature matching

checks.name: POU ST Syntax Guard
checks.description: Checks basic ST syntax in main implementation: unbalanced brackets, missing semicolons

checks.name: Unsigned Loop Underflow Guard
checks.description: Detects FOR loops with upper bound pattern 'unsigned_symbol - 1' which can underflow when symbol is zero

checks.name: POU Subtype Constraints
checks.description: Checks FUNCTION and PROGRAM specific constraints: FUNCTION must have return type, cannot have Methods/Properties/Actions; PROGRAM cannot have Properties

checks.name: EXTENDS Visibility Safety
checks.description: Ensures derived FUNCTION_BLOCK does not access private members of base FUNCTION_BLOCK

checks.name: Override Marker Validation
checks.description: Ensures overriding methods use explicit canonical override marker syntax

checks.name: Override Signature Compatibility
checks.description: Ensures overriding methods match base method signatures exactly

checks.name: Interface Contract Compatibility
checks.description: Ensures IMPLEMENTS contracts are complete and signature-compatible for methods/properties

checks.name: Policy Interface Contract Integrity
checks.description: Blocks architecture-weakening patterns where abstract base classes remove explicit IMPLEMENTS declarations despite matching interface contracts and active descendants

checks.name: EXTENDS Cycle Detection
checks.description: Ensures FUNCTION_BLOCK inheritance graph has no EXTENDS cycles

checks.name: Override Base Call Safety
checks.description: Ensures overriding lifecycle methods call SUPER^ for base behavior continuity

checks.name: Inheritance Property Contract
checks.description: Ensures derived properties preserve base type and accessor mutability contract

checks.name: FB_init Signature Contract
checks.description: Ensures FB_init uses canonical TwinCAT signature and BOOL return

checks.name: FB_init SUPER Call
checks.description: Ensures derived FB_init calls SUPER^.FB_init(...) when base defines FB_init

checks.name: THIS Pointer Consistency
checks.description: Detects ambiguous member shadowing and enforces explicit THIS^ member writes

checks.name: Abstract Class/Method Contract
checks.description: Validates ABSTRACT class/method semantics and inherited abstract method implementation in concrete classes

checks.name: FB_exit Signature Contract
checks.description: Validates FB_exit canonical signature (bInCopyCode : BOOL) : BOOL and warns if missing when __NEW() is used

checks.name: Dynamic Creation Attribute Requirement
checks.description: Ensures FBs used with __NEW() have {attribute 'enable_dynamic_creation'} or allocation silently fails at runtime

checks.name: Pointer Allocation/Deallocation Pairing
checks.description: Ensures every __NEW() allocation has a matching __DELETE() in cleanup methods (FB_exit, Dispose, Cleanup) to prevent memory leaks

checks.name: Composition Over Inheritance Depth
checks.description: Warns when inheritance depth exceeds configurable maximum (default: 4 levels). Deep inheritance violates SOLID principles and increases coupling

checks.name: Interface Segregation Principle
checks.description: Warns when interface surface area (methods + properties) exceeds configurable maximum (default: 7 members). Large interfaces force clients to depend on methods they don't use

checks.name: Method Visibility Consistency (Liskov)
checks.description: Ensures derived methods don't reduce visibility (PUBLIC → PROTECTED → PRIVATE). Reducing visibility violates Liskov Substitution Principle

checks.name: Diamond Inheritance Detection
checks.description: Warns when the same interface is inherited from multiple paths in the inheritance hierarchy. This can cause ambiguous method dispatch

checks.name: Abstract Instantiation Prevention
checks.description: Prevents runtime crashes by detecting attempts to instantiate abstract function blocks with __NEW(). Abstract FBs can only be used as base classes

checks.name: Property Accessor Pairing
checks.description: Warns about properties with only getter or only setter. Asymmetric properties often indicate incomplete implementation. Configurable via allow_readonly_properties and allow_writeonly_properties

checks.name: Method Count per POU
checks.description: Warns when a POU has too many methods + properties (default: 15 members). Excessive members indicate Single Responsibility Principle violation. Configurable via max_methods_per_pou

checks.name: Forbidden Abstract Attribute
checks.description: Detects {attribute 'abstract'} which is not valid TwinCAT 3 syntax. The compiler rejects it. Use METHOD ABSTRACT or FUNCTION_BLOCK ABSTRACT keyword syntax instead.

checks.name: Hardcoded Array-Index Dispatch
checks.description: Warns when the same method is called on an array with multiple hardcoded integer literals (e.g. arr[1].M_Reset / arr[2].M_Reset). Use a FOR loop over an interface array instead.
